name: Sebaceous Adenitis
description: Sebaceous adenitis is an inflammatory skin disease in which the sebaceous glands are selectively destroyed by immune-mediated inflammation. This results in follicular scaling, matting, and hair loss with a characteristic musty odour.
treatment_overview: Intensive topical oil treatments (baby oil soaks), special shampoos, essential fatty acid supplements, and immunomodulatory drugs (cyclosporine) manage the condition. It cannot be cured but can be well-controlled.
prevention_tips: DNA testing under development for some breeds
Skin biopsy before breeding to exclude subclinical disease
